projects.name: Limit Orderbook and Trade Matching Engine
projects.description: Built a high-performance limit order book and trade matching engine in C++ with support for market, limit, fill-or-kill, and immediate-or-cancel orders.

projects.name: Concurrent Asynchronous Logging System
projects.description: Implemented an asynchronous logging library in C++ that enabled concurrent thread-safe logging with a dedicated background writer and batched flushes.

projects.name: Realtime Carbon Credits Market Analysis Platform
projects.description: Architected a full-stack real-time analytics platform for live carbon credit pricing, trend signals, and risk analysis as part of Inter-IIT Tech Meet 14.0.

projects.name: Landing Location Detection Pipeline for Mars Rover using Classical Computer Vision
projects.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline to identify safe landing zones on Mars under compute constraints using classical image-processing techniques.
